name: Donate CTA does not show if app installed <7 days ago @ios @high-risk @1-devices
description: Mocks a custom install date 6 days, 23 hours, and 58 minutes ago, opens the app, and verifies that the Donate CTA does not show.
descriptionHtml: Mocks a custom install date 6 days, 23 hours, and 58 minutes ago, opens the app, and verifies that the Donate CTA does not show.
statusMessage: Error: Element with accessibility id "cta-heading" is visible after 2000ms when it should not be
